name: Miners’ Assembly
summary: The principal extraction organization for the Alliance’s mining zones, especially in the Eternal Lands.
motive: Keep ore, crystal, and geothermal resource streams flowing without collapsing the frontier.
power_relations: Operates under giant authority and coordinates with engineers, frontier crews, and transport networks
visible_membership_base: Miners, foremen, haulers, safety crews, survey teams.
current_tension_or_vulnerability: Deeper extraction buys short-term productivity at the cost of long-term instability and crew morale.
